title: Souls Refrain Return To Your Origin
display_title: Souls Refrain Return To Your Origin
wikitext:
[]: Soul's Refrain/Return To Your Origin             Quote Post by thedarkorb » Mon Jul 02, 2007 11:47 pm Both of these being Yoko Takahashi songs, where they written for Rebirth/EOE or where they songs she had already written? Neither of them showed up on the EOE soundtrack, which I thought was a little odd. Btw both songs kick major a*s.

[]: yoko takahashi             Quote Post by Thanatos » Tue Jul 03, 2007 12:26 am Greetings(felt necessary being the first post and all) I have song Tamashii No Refuran,(refrain of soul, souls refrain). Its listed as a Death and Rebirth single, and its also on the cd:Neon Genesis Evangelion Decade. A fine purchase/download i must say. So i think its safe to say she wrote it for the film. Not sure on the other song yet.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Tue Jul 03, 2007 12:38 am It's also on Refrain of Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by thedarkorb » Tue Jul 03, 2007 12:58 am I know where I can get them, I just wasn't sure if they where actually written for Evangelion or just a track she had already done on a album or something.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Jul 03, 2007 8:22 pm ALL of the Yoko Takahashi Eva songs (minus any Fly Me renditions ;)) can be found on the Decade Album, as well as 10 year remix/remake (whatever the hell the difference is, "I dunno lol") versions of the OP (Jazzy sounding) and Tamashii no Rufuran (R&Bish/Jazzish sounding...Dunno how else to describe it -_-; ) Of course, Decade also has the "newest" Eva song Tengoku no Kioku (Memories of Heaven) sung by Hayashibara Megumi-Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Tue Jul 03, 2007 8:25 pm ....an I a "bad fan" for not...having a "favorite" version of "Fly Me To the Moon"?!

[]:             Quote Post by 20XD6_Tyrant » Tue Jul 03, 2007 8:30 pm No, you aren't. I'm probably in the same boat with you on that subject.

[]:             Quote Post by thedarkorb » Wed Jul 04, 2007 12:07 am V wrote: ....an I a "bad fan" for not...having a "favorite" version of "Fly Me To the Moon"?!

[]:             Quote Post by TheAyanamiOtaku » Wed Jul 04, 2007 12:15 am i liked Rei #5 and Rei #6 versions...those were pretty nice. the song is too short TT.TT

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Wed Jul 04, 2007 2:08 am thedarkorb wrote: V wrote: ....an I a "bad fan" for not...having a "favorite" version of "Fly Me To the Moon"?!

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Wed Jul 04, 2007 6:50 am I don't like any version.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Wed Jul 04, 2007 9:47 am I like the Claire and the new Utada versions.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jul 04, 2007 5:46 pm Utada has a NEW version out? :shock: Then again, I think somebody mentioned that somewhere I LOVE the Frankie-baby version (the original way I heard it, whadda expect? ;)), the original Utada version, Eva-wise: Claire (my favorite of the 31 Eva versions of Fly Me ^^; ), Misato 4 Beat (Misato has the best pronunciation of ARM ), Rei (the best singer of the 3) #26, Asuka (Cutest-sounding) versions, and the ARM version. Ogata-sama's version is so-so, probably because of the fact she's doing it live. ^^;

[]:             Quote Post by Angel of Will » Mon Feb 03, 2014 3:35 pm By the way, I have a English lyrics adaptation out. It's in the fandom area: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/15814/Souls-Refrain-English-lyrics-adaptation-completed/

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Mon Feb 03, 2014 3:54 pm Didn't know this song had a thread of its own. It's on a disk I have, The Day of Second Impact. The disk itself is a compilation of songs from the TV series, Death, and EoE.

Neither of them showed up on the EOE soundtrack, which I thought was a little odd. Btw both songs kick major a*s.
